creator: chris@securityforensics.co.uk
text:
pine pgp filters 1.6 selects gnupg 2 in preference to gnupg 1.

Would it be possible, via a configuration option, to force selection of one or the other?

I have both installed and prefer to use gnupg1. The configuration script selects 2 automatically for me.

How-To-Repeat: Install both gnupg1 and gnupg2, then install pine-pgp-filters.
